hollow_wisp.name: Hollow Wisp
hollow_wisp.entry: A ribbon of dusk with two soft lights for eyes. It drifts to where lonely thoughts gather, and lingers.

gloaming_gaze.name: Gloaming Gaze
gloaming_gaze.entry: An unblinking eye adrift on the night air. It watches kindly, the way an old friend watches you sleep.

dusk_skitterling.name: Dusk Skitterling
dusk_skitterling.entry: It only stirs after dark, as if daylight might wake it from a pleasant dream it isn't finished having.

petal_dozer.name: Petal Dozer
petal_dozer.entry: A warm pink dozeling that hums in its sleep. The patient planet dreams it fondly, again and again.

gloom_weaver.name: Gloom Weaver
gloom_weaver.entry: A patient spinner of the deep, weaving the cave's hush into threads that read almost like a lullaby.

coil_warden.name: Coil Warden
coil_warden.entry: Curled tight as a held breath. Its shell keeps the memory of every echo the mine has ever made.

grotto_tendril.name: Grotto Tendril
grotto_tendril.entry: It sways in the dark like kelp in an ocean that dried up an age ago, still dreaming of the tide.

shadow_prowler.name: Shadow Prowler
shadow_prowler.entry: A gentle beast wearing the mountain's shadow. It paces the deep roads the planet paces in its sleep.
